explanation: Statement 2 is correct because the Digital India Land Records Modernization Programme (DILRMP) aims to digitize cadastral maps, which are essential for accurate land record management and transparency. Statement 3 is also correct as the scheme promotes transliteration of Records of Rights to ensure accessibility and understanding for a wider population across different linguistic groups recognized by the Constitution.

Statement 2 is correct because the Digital India Land Records Modernization Programme (DILRMP) aims to digitize cadastral maps, which are essential for accurate land record management and transparency. Statement 3 is also correct as the scheme promotes transliteration of Records of Rights to ensure accessibility and understanding for a wider population across different linguistic groups recognized by the Constitution.

Statement 3 is correct as the Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-Dhan (PM-SYM) scheme guarantees a minimum pension of ₹3,000 per month to subscribers upon attaining the age of 60 years. Statement 4 is also correct because the scheme provides for a family pension to the spouse and unmarried daughters of the subscriber in case of their demise.
